summary: Iteration 4 testing (13 features). Created backend test_pos_features_v4.py with 22 tests covering stock adjustments, quotations, bill return, day-close, profit-loss, expiring products, new Product/Bill/Settings fields. Found and FIXED 2 backend bugs (return-bill ObjectId leak, /products/expiring route shadowing). Final: 22/22 v4 tests + 41/41 v1-v3 regression = 63/63 pass. Frontend smoke verified: all 3 new views (Quotations, Stock Adjust, Day Close) load + render; Bills view shows RET- bills with red row + RETURN tag and 81 Return buttons vs 87 rows (correctly hidden on return bills); Reports view renders 2 recharts SVGs (Bar + Pie); Settings shows Logo/Receipt Header/Footer/Size/Loyalty fields; Inventory rows have 🔧/📑/🗑️ buttons; POS shows discount % / ₹ toggle, Split Payment button + Add Split row, Quote button; F2 keyboard shortcut focuses barcode input. Day Close has date picker. Wholesale price field NOT exposed in inventory add-product form (model has it, form missing). Many new interactive elements lack data-testid — listed in critical comments.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 due to ObjectId injected by motor.insert_one being returned in dict — FIXED by popping _id before return
Was 404 because /products/{product_id} (registered earlier) was matching the 'expiring' literal — FIXED by relocating route above the dynamic path
No backend stock-level validation; bill can still create with insufficient stock (carry-over from prior iterations, not introduced now)
quote_no is provided by client and not server-generated; collision possible if two clients post same number

profit_loss query uses created_at as ISO string comparison; works only because created_at is consistently stored as ISO string. If any document has a datetime object, filter will not match. Defensive: normalize on read.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration error: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by Emergent visual editor injecting <span style=display:contents> children into <option> elements. Browser console error but not blocking — root cause is editor-instrumented option text expressions. Consider rendering option text as plain string (no nested expressions like {p.name}) to avoid the instrumentation wrap.
Console error 'Failed to load resource: net::ERR_INVALID_URL' — likely rendered with empty string. Guard with conditional render or src placeholder.
wholesale_price model field is NOT exposed in the add-product form (Cost Price and Expiry Date are present). Cannot set wholesale price from UI.

issues: Discount % / ₹ buttons are small icon-only chips; consider tooltip or label for clarity
Split Payment row has no testid on method-select / amount-input / +Add Split / remove-split buttons
🔧 / 📑 / 🗑️ buttons have no data-testid; cannot target individually for tests
No data-testid on product select / quantity input / reason dropdown / submit
Date picker has no data-testid; Export to Excel button has no testid
New fields (logo upload, receipt header/footer/size, loyalty toggle/rates, expiry alert days) lack data-testid
data-receipt-size attribute is set on .receipt-modal as designed; verified

action_items: (addressed by testing agent) /products/expiring route order fix in server.py — verified working.
(addressed by testing agent) return_bill ObjectId leak fix in server.py — verified working.

Add data-testid attributes to all new interactive elements: discount-type-percent / discount-type-amount, split-payment-toggle, split-method-{i} / split-amount-{i} / split-remove-{i} / add-split-btn, save-as-quote-btn, loyalty-redeem-input, inventory-adjust-{barcode} / inventory-barcode-{barcode}, stock-adjust-product / stock-adjust-qty / stock-adjust-reason / stock-adjust-submit, day-close-date / day-close-export, settings-logo-upload / settings-logo-remove / settings-receipt-header / settings-receipt-footer / settings-receipt-size / settings-loyalty-enabled / settings-loyalty-rate / settings-loyalty-redeem-rate / settings-expiry-alert-days, quotation-convert-{id} / quotation-delete-{id}, barcode-modal / barcode-download-png.
Expose wholesale_price input in inventory add-product form (model already supports it).
Guard when logo_url is empty to avoid ERR_INVALID_URL console noise.
Stock Adjustments <option> text — render plain string (e.g., children directly inside option without nested expressions) to avoid editor-injected span hydration warning.

(carry-over) BillingPOS.jsx now 2718 lines — strongly recommend splitting into POS / Inventory / Bills / Balance / Quotations / StockAdjust / DayClose / Reports / Settings / ReceiptModal sub-components. Single-file maintenance risk grew significantly.
(carry-over) POST /api/bills should validate stock and reject if insufficient (currently allows negative stock).
Auto-generate quote_no server-side to prevent collisions; same for invoice_no on /bills (already handled?).
Migrate @app.on_event('shutdown') to FastAPI lifespan (carried from prior iterations).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py return_bill(): originally returned the dict that motor.insert_one mutates with _id; this triggered fastapi.encoders → TypeError on ObjectId → 500. Fixed by popping _id before return. Similar pattern exists in other endpoints (create_stock_adjustment, create_quotation, etc.) — they avoid the issue because they return the pydantic model instance, not the doc dict. Audit any future endpoint that returns a dict after insert_one for the same bug.

server.py: GET /products/expiring was unreachable because FastAPI matches /products/{product_id} (registered earlier) first. Route registration order matters in FastAPI — static paths must precede dynamic ones with same prefix. Apply same review to any other potential dynamic-path collisions.
server.py return_bill() does not decrement loyalty_points or revert customer.loyalty_earned from the original bill; if loyalty was awarded on original, it remains after return.
BillingPOS.jsx 2718 lines: exceeds 700-line guideline by 3.9x. Splitting is now urgent for any future iteration.

Frontend: many new interactive controls (discount toggle, split rows, quote, stock-adjust modal, barcode modal, settings loyalty/receipt/logo, day-close, quotation actions) lack data-testid — testability gap.
Frontend: wholesale_price exists on Product backend model but is NOT rendered in the add/edit product form — incomplete feature surface.
Frontend: Settings not guarded against empty string — produces ERR_INVALID_URL.
Stock Adjustments <option> hydration warning indicates option text uses expression-children that the editor wraps in <span>; refactor to children-as-string.

success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke (new views load, key controls present, F2 keyboard shortcut works, Split/Quote/Discount-toggle render, recharts SVGs render)

seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_V4_Prod_* products (with cost_price=60, wholesale_price=80, expiry in 15d), TEST_V4 bills, TEST_QT quotations, RET- return bills, TEST_V4 stock adjustments. A few remain in DB for inspection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_4 added 3 new VIEWS (QUOTATIONS, STOCK_ADJUSTMENTS, DAY_CLOSE) and 6+ new endpoints. Backend now has 4 collections in active use (products, bills, customers, settings, stock_adjustments, quotations, held_carts). 63 pytest tests across 4 files in /app/backend/tests/. data-testid coverage is incomplete for iteration-4 features — see action_items. BillingPOS.jsx is 2718 lines and SHOULD be split. Receipt modal carries data-receipt-size attribute correctly. Discount type toggle uses %/₹ buttons (no testid). F2 keyboard shortcut confirmed working via window.addEventListener. Recharts Bar+Pie render in Reports view. /api/bills/{id}/return restores stock and creates RET- prefixed negative-amount bill; /api/products/expiring is now reachable; /api/reports/day-close returns aggregated breakdown by date.

rca_of_fixes_applied.return_bill_500: motor.AsyncIOMotorCollection.insert_one mutates the passed dict by setting _id to a new ObjectId. The endpoint then returned that mutated dict; FastAPI's jsonable_encoder cannot serialize ObjectId, throwing TypeError → 500. Fix: pop('_id', None) before return. Reproduce: POST /api/bills/{any-bill}/return → 500. Verified fix by re-running test_return_bill_creates_negative_and_restores_stock — passes; bill returned with all expected fields and no ObjectId leak.
rca_of_fixes_applied.expiring_404: FastAPI matches routes in registration order. GET /products/{product_id} (line 265) was registered before GET /products/expiring (line 781), so 'expiring' was captured as a product_id and returned 404 (no product with id 'expiring'). Fix: relocate GET /products/expiring to immediately before /products/{product_id}. Verified fix by re-running test_expiring_products and test_expiring_products_zero_days — both pass.
